plugins.name: caicai-blog-translator
plugins.description: Translate English blog articles into Chinese by fetching content from URLs, converting to markdown, translating, and polishing

plugins.name: caicai-url-to-markdown
plugins.description: Convert URLs to clean Markdown format with automatic routing to the best fetching strategy for various sites

plugins.name: caicai-svg-to-png
plugins.description: Convert SVG files to PNG format with smart mode detection for Chrome extension icons or single PNG output

plugins.name: caicai-goal-prompt
plugins.description: Turn rough requirements into Codex /goal commands or portable agent goal prompts using objective, scope, constraints, acceptance, and blocked handling
